    22→class WeChatShareUtil(private val context: Context) {

    24→    companion object {
    25→        // 微信包名和类名
    26→        private const val WECHAT_PACKAGE_NAME = "com.tencent.mm"

    35→        )
    36→
    37→        // 检查微信是否安装
    38→        fun isWeChatAvailable(): Boolean {
    39→            return try {
    40→                context.packageManager.getPackageInfo(WECHAT_PACKAGE_NAME)?.applicationInfo != null
    41→            } catch (e: Exception) {
    42→                false
    43→            }
    44→        }
    45→
    46→        /**
    47→         * 创建分享Intent
    48→         */
    49→        fun createShareIntent(
    50→            packageName: String,
    51→            className: String,
    52→            uri: Uri
    53→        ): Intent {
    54→            return Intent().apply {
    55→                action = Intent.ACTION_SEND
    56→                setPackage(packageName)
    57→                setClassName(className)
    58→                putExtra("KDescription", "法院文档")
    59→                putExtra("KFilePath", uri.path)
    60→                putExtra("KFilePath_proof", uri.path)
    61→            }
    62→        }
    63→    }
    64→}

    28→/**
    29→ * 文档管理 Fragment（增强版）
    30→ *
    31→ * 新增功能：
    32→ * 1. 单选/多选模式切换
    33→ * 2. 多选后显示批量操作栏
    34→ * 3. 打包ZIP压缩分享
    35→ * 4. 分享到微信支持
    36→ */
    37→class DocsFragment : Fragment() {
    38→
    39→    private var _b: FragmentDocsBinding? = null
    40→    private val b get() = _b!!
    41→    private val vm: MainViewModel by activityViewModels()
    42→
    43→    // 选择模式
    44→    enum class SelectionMode {
    45→        SINGLE,      // 单选模式
    46→        MULTI        // 多选模式
    47→    }
    48→
    49→    private var selectionMode: SelectionMode = SelectionMode.SINGLE
    50→    private val selectedDocIds = mutableSetOf<Long>()
    51→
    52→    override fun onCreateView(i: LayoutInflater, c: ViewGroup?, s: Bundle?): View {
    53→        _b = FragmentDocsBinding.inflate(i, c, false)
    54→        return b.root
    55→    }
    56→
    57→    override fun onViewCreated(view: View, savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {
    58→        super.onViewCreated(view, savedInstanceState)
    59→
    60→        setupToolbar()
    61→        setupRecyclerView()
    62→        observeData()
    63→        setupClickListeners()
    64→    }
    65→
    66→    /**
    67→     * 设置工具栏
    68→     */
    69→    private fun setupToolbar() {
    70→        b.toolbar.title = "文档管理"
    71→        b.toolbar.setNavigationIcon(R.drawable.ic_folder)
    72→    b.toolbar.inflateMenu(R.menu.menu_docs_overflow)
    73→    }
    74→
    75→    /**
    76→     * 设置列表
    77→     */
    78→    private fun setupRecyclerView() {
    79→        // 文档列表
    80→        b.rvDocs.layoutManager = LinearLayoutManager(requireContext())
    81→        val docAdapter = DocAdapter(
    82→            onClick = { doc -> previewPdf(doc) },
    83→            onSelect = { doc -> toggleSelection(doc.id) },
    84→            onLongPress = { doc -> showDocumentContextMenu(doc) }
    85→        )
    86→        b.rvDocs.adapter = docAdapter
    87→
    88→        // 空状态处理
    89→        updateEmptyState()
    90→    }
    91→
    92→    /**
    93→     * 观察数据
    94→     */
    95→    private fun observeData() {
    96→        // 观察文档列表
    97→        vm.currentDocs.observe(viewLifecycleOwner) { list ->
    98→            docAdapter.submitList(list)
    99→            updateEmptyState(list)
   100→            updateSelectionFromAdapter()
   101→        }
   102→
   103→        // 观察日历同步状态
   104→        vm.calendarSyncMap.observe(viewLifecycleOwner) { map ->
   105→            docAdapter.updateCalendarSync(map)
   106→        }
   107→    }
   108→
   109→    /**
   110→     * 设置点击监听器
   111→     */
   112→    private fun setupClickListeners() {
   113→        // 全选按钮
   114→        b.btnSelectAll.setOnClickListener {
   115→            toggleSelectionMode()
   116→        }
   117→
   118→        // 删除按钮
   119→        b.btnDelete.setOnClickListener {
   120→            handleDeleteClick()
   121→        }
   122→
   123→        // 批量操作按钮
   124→        b.btnShareWeChat.setOnClickListener {
   125→            handleShareWeChatClick()
   126→        }
   127→    }
   128→
   129→    /**
   130→     * 切换选择模式
   131→     */
   132→    private fun toggleSelectionMode() {
   133→        when (selectionMode) {
   134→            SelectionMode.SINGLE -> {
   135→                // 切换到多选模式
   136→                selectionMode = SelectionMode.MULTI
   137→                b.btnSelectAll.text = "取消全选"
   138→                showBatchActionBar(true)
   139→                docAdapter.setMultiSelectMode(true)
   140→            }
   141→            SelectionMode.MULTI -> {
   142→                // 切换到单选模式
   143→                selectionMode = SelectionMode.SINGLE
   144→                b.btnSelectAll.text = "全选"
   145→                showBatchActionBar(false)
   146→                docAdapter.setMultiSelectMode(false)
   147→                // 清空选择
   148→                clearAllSelection()
   149→            }
   150→        }
   151→    }
   152→
   153→    /**
   154→     * 显示批量操作栏
   155→     */
   156→    private fun showBatchActionBar(show: Boolean) {
   157→        b.selectionActionBar.visibility = if (show) View.VISIBLE else View.GONE
   158→        b.tvBatchActionHint.visibility = if (show) View.VISIBLE else View.GONE
   159→        b.btnDelete.text = if (show) "删除选中" else "删除"
   160→        b.btnShareWeChat.visibility = if (show) View.VISIBLE else View.GONE
   161→
   162→        // 更新提示文本
   163→        b.tvSelectionHint.text = if (show) {
   164→            val count = selectedDocIds.size
   165→            "已选 $count 项"
   166→        } else {
   167→            ""
   168→        }
   169→    }
   170→
   171→    /**
   172→     * 隐藏批量操作栏
   173→     */
   174→    private fun hideBatchActionBar() {
   175→        showBatchActionBar(false)
   176→        // 清空选择
   177→        clearAllSelection()
   178→    }
   179→
   180→    /**
   181→     * 更新空状态
   182→     */
   183→    private fun updateEmptyState(list: List<DocumentItem>) {
   184→        val hasDocuments = list.any { it is DocumentItem.Document }
   185→        b.tvEmpty.visibility = if (!hasDocuments) View.VISIBLE else View.GONE
   186→        b.rvDocs.visibility = if (hasDocuments) View.VISIBLE else View.GONE
   187→    }
   188→
   189→    /**
   190→     * 从适配器更新选择状态
   191→     */
   192→    private fun updateSelectionFromAdapter() {
   193→        selectedDocIds.clear()
   194→        (b.rvDocs.adapter as? DocAdapter)?.getSelectedIds(selectedDocIds)
   195→    }
   196→
   197→    /**
   198→     * 清空所有选择
   199→     */
   200→    private fun clearAllSelection() {
   201→        selectedDocIds.clear()
   202→        (b.rvDocs.adapter as? DocAdapter)?.clearSelection()
   203→        updateActionBar()
   204→    }
   205→
   206→    /**
   207→     * 处理删除点击
   208→     */
   209→    private fun handleDeleteClick() {
   210→        when (selectionMode) {
   211→            SelectionMode.SINGLE -> {
   212→                // 单选模式：删除当前项
   213→                val currentId = (b.rvDocs.adapter as? DocAdapter)?.getCurrentDocumentId()
   214→                if (currentId != null) {
   215→                    showSingleDeleteDialog(currentId)
   216→                }
   217→            }
   218→            SelectionMode.MULTI -> {
   219→                // 多选模式：显示删除选项对话框
   220→                val count = selectedDocIds.size
   221→                if (count == 0) {
   222→                    Toast.makeText(requireContext(), "请先选择文档", Toast.LENGTH_SHORT).show()
   223→                    return
   224→                }
   225→                showMultiDeleteDialog(count)
   226→            }
   227→        }
   228→    }
   229→
   230→    /**
   231→     * 单个删除对话框
   232→     */
   233→    private fun showSingleDeleteDialog(docId: Long) {
   234→        AlertDialog.Builder(requireContext())
   235→            .setTitle("确认删除")
   236→            .setMessage("确定删除这个文档吗？")
   237→            .setPositiveButton("删除") { _, _ ->
   238→                performDelete(listOf(docId), deleteFiles = true)
   239→            }
   240→            .setNegativeButton("取消") { _, _ ->
   241→                // 用户取消
   242→            }
   243→            .show()
   244→    }
   245→
   246→    /**
   247→     * 多选删除对话框
   248→     */
   249→    private fun showMultiDeleteDialog(count: Int) {
   250→        AlertDialog.Builder(requireContext())
   251→            .setTitle("确认删除")
   252→            .setMessage("将删除 $count 个文档")
   253→            .setItems(arrayOf(
   254→                "仅删除记录（保留文件）",
   255→                "删除记录和文件"
   256→            ))
   257→            .setPositiveButton("删除") { _, which ->
   258→                when (which) {
   259→                    0 -> {
   260→                        // 仅删除记录
   261→                        performDelete(selectedDocIds.toList(), deleteFiles = false)
   262→                    }
   263→                    1 -> {
   264→                        // 删除记录和文件
   265→                        performDelete(selectedDocIds.toList(), deleteFiles = true)
   266→                    }
   267→                }
   268→            }
   269→            .setNegativeButton("取消") { _, _ ->
   270→                // 用户取消
   271→            }
   272→            .show()
   273→    }
   274→
   275→    /**
   276→     * 执行删除操作
   277→     */
   278→    private fun performDelete(ids: List<Long>, deleteFiles: Boolean) {
   279→        lifecycleScope.launch {
   280→            // 显示进度
   281→            Toast.makeText(requireContext(), "正在删除...", Toast.LENGTH_SHORT).show()
   282→
   283→            if (deleteFiles) {
   284→                // 删除记录和文件
   285→                vm.deleteDocs(ids, deleteFiles = true)
   286→
   287→                // 显示文件路径并删除
   288→                vm.getDocsByIds(ids) { docs ->
   289→                    docs.forEach { doc ->
   290→                        val file = File(doc.filePath)
   291→                        if (file.exists()) {
   292→                            file.delete()
   293→                        }
   294→                    }
   295→                }
   296→            } else {
   297→                // 仅删除记录
   298→                vm.deleteDocs(ids, deleteFiles = false)
   299→            }
   300→
   301→            // 清空选择
   302→            clearAllSelection()
   303→
   304→            // 完成提示
   305→            Toast.makeText(requireContext(), "删除完成", Toast.LENGTH_SHORT).show()
   306→        }
   307→    }
   308→
   309→    /**
   310→     * 处理微信分享点击
   311→     */
   312→    private fun handleShareWeChatClick() {
   313→        val count = selectedDocIds.size
   314→        if (count == 0) {
   315→            Toast.makeText(requireContext(), "请先选择文档", Toast.LENGTH_SHORT).show()
   316→            return
   317→        }
   318→
   319→        when (count) {
   320→            1 -> {
   321→                // 单个文件：直接分享
   322→                vm.getDocsByIds(selectedDocIds.toList()) { docs ->
   323→                    docs.firstOrNull()?.let { shareToWeChat(it) }
   324→                }
   325→            }
   326→            else -> {
   327→                // 多个文件：压缩后分享
   328→                showCompressionDialog()
   329→            }
   330→        }
   331→    }
   332→
   333→    /**
   334→     * 压缩对话框
   335→     */
   336→    private fun showCompressionDialog() {
   337→        // 获取选中的文档
   338→        val docs = mutableListOf<DocumentItem.Document>()
   339→        (b.rvDocs.adapter as? DocAdapter)?.getSelectedDocuments(docs)
   340→
   341→        if (docs.isEmpty()) {
   342→            Toast.makeText(requireContext(), "请先选择文档", Toast.LENGTH_SHORT).show()
   343→            return
   344→        }
   345→
   346→        // 计算文件总大小
   347→        val totalSize = docs.sumOf { it.record.fileSize }
   348→        val totalSizeMB = totalSize / (1024 * 1024)
   349→        val sizeText = if (totalSizeMB < 1) {
   350→            "${String.format("%.2f", totalSizeMB)} MB"
   351→        } else {
   352→            "$totalSizeMB MB"
   353→        }
   354→
   355→        // 显示进度对话框
   356→        val progressDialog = createProgressDialog("正在打包压缩...")
   357→        progressDialog.show()
   358→
   359→        lifecycleScope.launch(Dispatchers.IO) {
   360→            try {
   361→                // 创建ZIP文件
   362→                val zipFile = createZipFile(docs)
   363→
   364→                progressDialog.dismiss()
   365→
   366→                // 调用微信分享
   367→                shareZipToWeChat(zipFile, docs.size)
   368→
   369→            } catch (e: Exception) {
   370→                progressDialog.dismiss()
   371→                Toast.makeText(requireContext(), "打包失败：${e.message}", Toast.LENGTH_SHORT).show()
   372→            }
   373→        }
   374→    }
   375→
   376→    /**
   377→     * 创建ZIP文件
   378→     */
   379→    private suspend fun createZipFile(docs: List<DocumentItem.Document>): File {
   380→        return withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   381→            val timestamp = System.currentTimeMillis()
   382→            val zipFile = File(requireContext().cacheDir, "court_docs_$timestamp.zip")
   383→
   384→            // 显示详细进度
   385→            val progress = createProgressDialog("正在压缩 ${docs.size} 个文件...")
   386→            var processedCount = 0
   387→            var lastUpdateTime = System.currentTimeMillis()
   388→
   389→            ZipOutputStream(zipFile).use { zos ->
   390→                for (doc in docs) {
   391→                    val file = File(doc.record.filePath)
   392→                    if (!file.exists()) {
   393→                        progress.updateProgress("跳过缺失文件", processedCount, docs.size)
   394→                        processedCount++
   395→                        lastUpdateTime = System.currentTimeMillis()
   396→                        delay(10)
   397→                        continue
   398→                    }
   399→
   400→                    // 添加文件到ZIP
   401→                    val entry = ZipEntry(doc.record.fileName)
   402→                    zos.putNextEntry(entry)
   403→                    file.inputStream().use { input ->
   404→                        input.copyTo(zos)
   405→                    }
   406→
   407→                    progress.updateProgress("压缩中", processedCount, docs.size)
   408→                    processedCount++
   409→                    lastUpdateTime = System.currentTimeMillis()
   410→                    delay(50)
   411→                }
   412→
   413→                progress.updateProgress("完成", docs.size, docs.size)
   414→            }
   415→
   416→            return zipFile
   417→        }
   418→    }
   419→
   420→    /**
   421→     * 分享ZIP到微信
   422→     */
   423→    private fun shareZipToWeChat(zipFile: File, fileCount: Int) {
   424→        val shareUtil = WeChatShareUtil(requireContext())
   425→
   426→        // 获取可用分享目标
   427→        val targets = shareUtil.getAvailableShareTargets()
   428→
   429→        if (targets.isEmpty()) {
   430→            // 没有任何分享应用，使用系统分享
   431→            shareZipSystem(zipFile, fileCount)
   432→            return
   433→        }
   434→
   435→        // 显示分享选择对话框
   436→        showShareTargetDialog(targets, zipFile, fileCount)
   437→    }
   438→
   439→    /**
   440→     * 分享目标选择对话框
   441→     */
   442→    private fun showShareTargetDialog(
   443→        targets: List<ShareTarget>,
   444→        zipFile: File,
   445→        fileCount: Int
   446→    ) {
   447→        val targetNames = targets.map {
   448→            "${it.appName} (${if (it.priority == 1) "推荐" else ""})"
   449→        }.toTypedArray()
   450→
   451→        AlertDialog.Builder(requireContext())
   452→            .setTitle("选择分享方式")
   453→            .setSingleChoiceItems(targetNames, 0)
   454→            .setPositiveButton("分享") { _, which ->
   455→                val target = targets[which]
   456→                shareToTarget(target, zipFile, fileCount)
   457→            }
   458→            .setNegativeButton("取消") { _, _ ->
   459→                // 用户取消，清理ZIP文件
   460→                zipFile.delete()
   461→            }
   462→            .show()
   463→    }
   464→
   465→    /**
   466→     * 分享到指定目标
   467→     */
   468→    private fun shareToTarget(
   469→        target: ShareTarget,
   470→        zipFile: File,
   471→        fileCount: Int
   472→    ) {
   473→        val uri = FileProvider.getUriForFile(
   474→            requireContext(),
   475→            "${requireContext().packageName}.fileprovider",
   476→            zipFile
   477→        )
   478→
   479→        when (target.packageName) {
   480→            WeChatShareUtil.WECHAT_PACKAGE_NAME -> {
   481→                // 分享到微信
   482→                shareToWeChatIntent(uri, fileCount)
   483→            }
   484→            else -> {
   485→                // 其他应用使用系统分享
   486→                shareSystemIntent(uri, fileCount, target.appName)
   487→            }
   488→        }
   489→    }
   490→
   491→    /**
   492→     * 分享到微信
   493→     */
   494→    private fun shareToWeChatIntent(uri: Uri, fileCount: Int) {
   495→        val intent = WeChatShareUtil.createShareIntent(
   496→            packageName = WeChatShareUtil.WECHAT_PACKAGE_NAME,
   497→            className = WeChatShareUtil.POSSIBLE_SHARE_CLASSES[0],
   498→            uri = uri
   499→        ).apply {

1→package util.file
     2→
     3→import java.io.File
     4→import java.text.DecimalFormat
     5→
     6→/**
     7→ * 文件操作工具类
     8→ *
     9→ * 统一管理文件相关操作，消除重复代码
    10→ * 提供：
    11→ * - ensureDir(): 确保目录存在，不存在则创建
    12→ * - formatSize(): 格式化文件大小显示
    13→ * - getFileExtension(): 获取文件扩展名
    14→ * - createPdfDirectory(): 创建PDF目录
    15→ */
    16→object FileUtils {
    17→
    18→    /**
    19→     * 确保目录存在，不存在则创建
    20→     * @param file 目录文件对象
    21→     * @return 是否成功
    22→     */
    23→    fun ensureDir(file: File): Boolean {
    24→        return if (!file.exists()) {
    25→            file.mkdirs()
    26→        } else {
    27→            true
    28→        }
    29→    }
    30→
    31→    /**
    32→     * 格式化文件大小显示
    33→     * @param size 文件大小（字节）
    34→     * @return 格式化后的大小字符串（KB/MB/GB）
    35→     */
    36→    fun formatSize(size: Long): String {
    37→        if (size <= 0) return "0 B"
    38→
    39→        val units = arrayOf("B", "KB", "MB", "GB", "TB")
    40→        var index = 0
    41→        var fileSize = size.toDouble()
    42→
    43→        while (fileSize >= 1024 && index < units.size - 1) {
    44→            fileSize /= 1024
    45→            index++
    46→        }
    47→
    48→        val df = DecimalFormat("#.##")
    49→        return "${df.format(fileSize)} ${units[index]}"
    50→    }
    51→
    52→    /**
    53→     * 获取文件扩展名
    54→     * @param file 文件对象
    55→     * @return 扩展名（包含点号），如果没有扩展名返回空字符串
    56→     */
    57→    fun getFileExtension(file: File): String {
    58→        return getFileExtension(file.name)
    59→    }
    60→
    61→    /**
    62→     * 从文件名获取扩展名
    63→     * @param filename 文件名
    64→     * @return 扩展名（包含点号），如果没有扩展名返回空字符串
    65→     */
    66→    fun getFileExtension(filename: String): String {
    67→        val lastDot = filename.lastIndexOf('.')
    68→        return if (lastDot > 0) {
    69→            filename.substring(lastDot)
    70→        } else {
    71→            ""
    72→        }
    73→    }
    74→
    75→    /**
    76→     * 创建PDF输出目录
    77→     * @param baseDir 基础目录
    78→     * @return PDF目录文件对象
    79→     */
    80→    fun createPdfDirectory(baseDir: File): File {
    81→        val pdfDir = File(baseDir, "CourtAssistant/PDFs")
    82→        ensureDir(pdfDir)
    83→        return pdfDir
    84→    }
    85→}

   265→                when (selectedOption) {
   266→                    0 -> performDelete(selectedDocIds.toList(), deleteFiles = false)
   267→                    1 -> performDelete(selectedDocIds.toList(), deleteFiles = true)
   268→                    else -> performDelete(selectedDocIds.toList(), deleteFiles = false)
   269→                }
   270→            }
   271→            .setNegativeButton("取消", null)
   272→            .show()
   273→    }
   274→
   275→    /**
   276→     * 执行删除操作
   277→     */
   278→    private fun performDelete(ids: List<Long>, deleteFiles: Boolean) {
   279→        lifecycleScope.launch {
   280→            try {
   281→                // 显示进度
   282→                Toast.makeText(requireContext(), "正在删除...", Toast.LENGTH_SHORT).show()
   283→
   284→                if (deleteFiles) {
   285→                    // 显示文件路径并删除
   286→                    vm.getDocsByIds(ids) { docs ->
   287→                        docs.forEach { doc ->
   288→                            val file = File(doc.filePath)
   289→                            if (file.exists()) {
   290→                                file.delete()
   291→                            }
   292→                        }
   293→                    }
   294→                }
   295→
   296→                // 删除记录
   297→                vm.deleteDocs(ids, deleteFiles)
   298→
   299→                // 清空选择
   300→                clearAllSelection()
   301→
   302→                // 完成提示
   303→                Toast.makeText(requireContext(), "删除完成", Toast.LENGTH_SHORT).show()
   304→            } catch (e: Exception) {
   305→                Toast.makeText(requireContext(), "删除失败: ${e.message}", Toast.LENGTH_SHORT).show()
   306→            }
   307→        }
   308→    }
   309→
   310→    /**
   311→     * 处理微信分享点击
   312→     */
   313→    private fun handleShareWeChatClick() {
   314→        val count = selectedDocIds.size
   315→        if (count == 0) {
   316→            Toast.makeText(requireContext(), "请先选择文档", Toast.LENGTH_SHORT).show()
   317→            return
   318→        }
   319→
   320→        when (count) {
   321→            1 -> {
   322→                // 单个文件：直接分享
   323→                vm.getDocsByIds(selectedDocIds.toList()) { docs ->
   324→                    docs.firstOrNull()?.let { shareToWeChat(it) }
   325→                }
   326→            }
   327→            else -> {
   328→                // 多个文件：压缩后分享
   329→                showCompressionDialog()
   330→            }
   331→        }
   332→    }
   333→
   334→    /**
   335→     * 压缩对话框
   336→     */
   337→    private fun showCompressionDialog() {
   338→        // 获取选中的文档
   339→        val docs = mutableListOf<DocumentItem.Document>()
   340→        docAdapter?.getSelectedDocuments(docs)
   341→
   342→        if (docs.isEmpty()) {
   343→            Toast.makeText(requireContext(), "请先选择文档", Toast.LENGTH_SHORT).show()
   344→            return
   345→        }
   346→
   347→        // 计算文件总大小
   348→        val totalSize = docs.sumOf { it.record.fileSize }
   349→        val totalSizeMB = totalSize / (1024 * 1024)
   350→        val sizeText = if (totalSizeMB < 1) {
   351→            String.format("%.2f MB", totalSize.toDouble() / (1024 * 1024))
   352→        } else {
   353→            "$totalSizeMB MB"
   354→        }
   355→
   356→        // 显示进度对话框
   357→        val progressDialog = ProgressDialog(requireContext()).apply {
   358→            setMessage("正在打包 $sizeText...")
   359→            setCancelable(false)
   360→            setProgressStyle(ProgressDialog.STYLE_HORIZONTAL)
   361→            max = docs.size
   362→        }
   363→        progressDialog.show()
   364→
   365→        lifecycleScope.launch(Dispatchers.IO) {
   366→            try {
   367→                // 创建ZIP文件
   368→                val zipFile = createZipFile(docs, progressDialog)
   369→
   370→                withContext(Dispatchers.Main) {
   371→                    progressDialog.dismiss()
   372→                    // 调用微信分享
   373→                    shareZipToWeChat(zipFile, docs.size)
   374→                }
   375→            } catch (e: Exception) {
   376→                withContext(Dispatchers.Main) {
   377→                    progressDialog.dismiss()
   378→                    Toast.makeText(requireContext(), "打包失败：${e.message}", Toast.LENGTH_SHORT).show()
   379→                }
   380→            }
   381→        }
   382→    }
   383→
   384→    /**
   385→     * 创建ZIP文件
   386→     */
   387→    private suspend fun createZipFile(
   388→        docs: List<DocumentItem.Document>,
   389→        progress: ProgressDialog
   390→    ): File = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   391→        val timestamp = System.currentTimeMillis()
   392→        val zipFile = File(requireContext().cacheDir, "court_docs_$timestamp.zip")
   393→
   394→        var processedCount = 0
   395→
   396→        ZipOutputStream(zipFile.outputStream()).use { zos ->
   397→            for (doc in docs) {
   398→                val file = File(doc.record.filePath)
   399→                if (!file.exists()) {
   400→                    processedCount++
   401→                    withContext(Dispatchers.Main) {
   402→                        progress.progress = processedCount
   403→                    }
   404→                    delay(10)
   405→                    continue
   406→                }
   407→
   408→                // 添加文件到ZIP
   409→                val entry = ZipEntry(doc.record.fileName)
   410→                zos.putNextEntry(entry)
   411→                file.inputStream().use { input ->
   412→                    input.copyTo(zos)
   413→                }
   414→                zos.closeEntry()
   415→
   416→                processedCount++
   417→                withContext(Dispatchers.Main) {
   418→                    progress.progress = processedCount
   419→                }
   420→                delay(50)
   421→            }
   422→        }
   423→
   424→        return@withContext zipFile
   425→    }
   426→
   427→    /**
   428→     * 分享ZIP到微信
   429→     */
   430→    private fun shareZipToWeChat(zipFile: File, fileCount: Int) {
   431→        val shareUtil = WeChatShareUtil(requireContext())
   432→
   433→        // 获取可用分享目标
   434→        val targets = shareUtil.getAvailableShareTargets()
   435→
   436→        if (targets.isEmpty()) {
   437→            // 没有任何分享应用，使用系统分享
   438→            shareZipSystem(zipFile, fileCount)
   439→            return
   440→        }
   441→
   442→        // 显示分享选择对话框
   443→        showShareTargetDialog(targets, zipFile, fileCount)
   444→    }
   445→
   446→    /**
   447→     * 分享目标选择对话框
   448→     */
   449→    private fun showShareTargetDialog(
   450→        targets: List<ShareTarget>,
   451→        zipFile: File,
   452→        fileCount: Int
   453→    ) {
   454→        val targetNames = targets.map {
   455→            "${it.appName} ${if (it.priority == 1) "(推荐)" else ""}"
   456→        }.toTypedArray()
   457→
   458→        AlertDialog.Builder(requireContext())
   459→            .setTitle("选择分享方式")
   460→            .setSingleChoiceItems(targetNames, 0) { _, _ -> }
   461→            .setPositiveButton("分享") { dialog, _ ->
   462→                val selectedPosition = (dialog as AlertDialog).listView.checkedItemPosition
   463→                if (selectedPosition >= 0 && selectedPosition < targets.size) {
   464→                    val target = targets[selectedPosition]
   465→                    shareToTarget(target, zipFile, fileCount)
   466→                }
   467→            }
   468→            .setNegativeButton("取消") { _ ->
   469→                // 用户取消，清理ZIP文件
   470→                zipFile.delete()
   471→            }
   472→            .show()
   473→    }
   474→
   475→    /**
   476→     * 分享到指定目标
   477→     */
   478→    private fun shareToTarget(
   479→        target: ShareTarget,
   480→        zipFile: File,
   481→        fileCount: Int
   482→    ) {
   483→        val uri = com.shanfuchun.courtassistant.util.file.UriUtils.createFileUri(
   484→            requireContext(),
   485→            zipFile
   486→        )
   487→
   488→        when (target.packageName) {
   489→            WeChatShareUtil.WECHAT_PACKAGE_NAME -> {
   490→                // 分享到微信
   491→                shareToWeChatIntent(uri, fileCount)
   492→            }
   493→            else -> {
   494→                // 其他应用使用系统分享
   495→                shareSystemIntent(uri, fileCount, target.appName)
   496→            }
   497→        }
   498→    }
   499→
   500→    /**
   501→     * 分享到微信
   502→     */
   503→    private fun shareToWeChatIntent(uri: Uri, fileCount: Int) {
   504→        val intent = WeChatShareUtil.createShareIntent(
   505→            packageName = WeChatShareUtil.WECHAT_PACKAGE_NAME,
   506→            className = WeChatShareUtil.POSSIBLE_SHARE_CLASSES[0],
   507→            uri = uri
   508→        ).apply {
   509→            putExtra("KDescription", "$fileCount 个法院文档")
   510→            putExtra("KFilePath", uri.path)
   511→        }
   512→
   513→        try {
   514→            startActivity(intent)
   515→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   516→            // 微信未安装或分享失败
   517→            showWeChatInstallDialog()
   518→        }
   519→    }
   520→
   521→    /**
   522→     * 微信未安装对话框
   523→     */
   524→    private fun showWeChatInstallDialog() {
   525→        AlertDialog.Builder(requireContext())
   526→            .setTitle("分享提示")
   527→            .setMessage("未检测到微信应用，是否前往安装？")
   528→            .setPositiveButton("安装") { _, _ ->
   529→                openWeChatInGooglePlay()
   530→            }
   531→            .setNegativeButton("取消") { _ ->
   532→                Toast.makeText(requireContext(), "已取消分享", Toast.LENGTH_SHORT).show()
   533→            }
   534→            .setNeutralButton("其他方式") { _, _ ->
   535→                // 降级使用系统分享
   536→                Toast.makeText(requireContext(), "请选择其他分享方式", Toast.LENGTH_SHORT).show()
   537→            }
   538→            .show()
   539→    }
   540→
   541→    /**
   542→     * 使用系统分享ZIP
   543→     */
   544→    private fun shareZipSystem(zipFile: File, fileCount: Int) {
   545→        val uri = com.shanfuchun.courtassistant.util.file.UriUtils.createFileUri(
   546→            requireContext(),
   547→            zipFile
   548→        )
   549→
   550→        val intent = Intent(Intent.ACTION_SEND).apply {
   551→            type = "application/zip"
   552→            flags = Intent.FLAG_GRANT_READ_URI_PERMISSION
   553→            putExtra(Intent.EXTRA_STREAM, uri)
   554→            putExtra(Intent.EXTRA_TEXT, "$fileCount 个法院文档")
   555→        }
   556→
   557→        startActivity(Intent.createChooser(intent, "分享到"))
   558→    }
   559→
   560→    /**
   561→     * 使用系统分享Intent
   562→     */
   563→    private fun shareSystemIntent(uri: Uri, fileCount: Int, appName: String) {
   564→        val intent = Intent(Intent.ACTION_SEND).apply {
   565→            type = "*/*"
   566→            flags = Intent.FLAG_GRANT_READ_URI_PERMISSION
   567→            putExtra(Intent.EXTRA_STREAM, uri)
   568→            putExtra(Intent.EXTRA_TEXT, "$fileCount 个法院文档")
   569→        }
   570→
   571→        try {
   572→            startActivity(Intent.createChooser(intent, "分享到 $appName"))
   573→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   574→            Toast.makeText(requireContext(), "分享失败", Toast.LENGTH_SHORT).show()
   575→        }
   576→    }
   577→
   578→    /**
   579→     * 预览PDF文档
   580→     */
   581→    private fun previewPdf(doc: DocumentItem.Document) {
   582→        val file = File(doc.record.filePath)
   583→        if (!file.exists()) {
   584→            Toast.makeText(requireContext(), "文件不存在", Toast.LENGTH_SHORT).show()
   585→            return
   586→        }
   587→
   588→        val uri = com.shanfuchun.courtassistant.util.file.UriUtils.createFileUri(
   589→            requireContext(),
   590→            file
   591→        )
   592→
   593→        val intent = Intent(Intent.ACTION_VIEW).apply {
   594→            setDataAndType(uri, "application/pdf")
   595→            flags = Intent.FLAG_GRANT_READ_URI_PERMISSION
   596→        }
   597→
   598→        try {
   599→            startActivity(intent)
   600→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   601→            Toast.makeText(requireContext(), "无法打开PDF", Toast.LENGTH_SHORT).show()
   602→        }
   603→    }
   604→
   605→    /**
   606→     * 显示文档上下文菜单
   607→     */
   608→    private fun showDocumentContextMenu(doc: DocumentItem.Document) {
   609→        val options = arrayOf("预览", "分享", "删除", "取消")
   610→        AlertDialog.Builder(requireContext())
   611→            .setTitle(doc.record.fileName)
   612→            .setItems(options) { _, which ->
   613→                when (which) {
   614→                    0 -> previewPdf(doc)
   615→                    1 -> shareToWeChat(doc)
   616→                    2 -> performDelete(listOf(doc.id), deleteFiles = true)
   617→                }
   618→            }
   619→            .show()
   620→    }
   621→
   622→    /**
   623→     * 分享单个文档到微信
   624→     */
   625→    private fun shareToWeChat(doc: DocumentItem.Document) {
   626→        val file = File(doc.record.filePath)
   627→        if (!file.exists()) {
   628→            Toast.makeText(requireContext(), "文件不存在", Toast.LENGTH_SHORT).show()
   629→            return
   630→        }
   631→
   632→        lifecycleScope.launch {
   633→            val shareUtil = WeChatShareUtil(requireContext())
   634→            shareUtil.shareFile(file)
   635→        }
   636→    }
   637→
   638→    /**
   639→     * 打开微信安装页面
   640→     */
   641→    private fun openWeChatInGooglePlay() {
   642→        try {
   643→            val intent = Intent(Intent.ACTION_VIEW).apply {
   644→                data = Uri.parse("market://details?id=com.tencent.mm")
   645→            }
   646→            startActivity(intent)
   647→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   648→            Toast.makeText(requireContext(), "无法打开应用商店", Toast.LENGTH_SHORT).show()
   649→        }
   650→    }
   651→}

<LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto"
    android:layout_width="match_parent"
    android:layout_height="match_parent"
    android:orientation="vertical"
    android:background="@color/bg_rice">

    <!-- Toolbar -->
    <androidx.appcompat.widget.Toolbar
        android:id="@+id/toolbar"
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="?attr/actionBarSize"
        android:background="@color/primary"
        android:elevation="4dp"
        app:titleTextColor="@color/white" />

    <!-- 选择操作栏 -->
    <LinearLayout
        android:id="@+id/selection_action_bar"
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
        android:orientation="horizontal"
        android:padding="12dp"
        android:background="@color/bg_paper"
        android:visibility="gone"
        android:gravity="center_vertical">

        <TextView
            android:id="@+id/tv_selection_hint"
            android:layout_width="0dp"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:layout_weight="1"
            android:text="已选 0 项"
            android:textSize="14sp"
            android:textColor="@color/ink_gray" />

        <TextView
            android:id="@+id/tv_batch_action_hint"
            android:layout_width="wrap_content"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:text="批量操作"
            android:textSize="12sp"
            android:textColor="@color/ink_light"
            android:visibility="gone"
            android:layout_marginEnd="8dp" />
    </LinearLayout>

    <!-- 操作按钮栏 -->
    <LinearLayout
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
        android:orientation="horizontal"
        android:padding="8dp"
        android:gravity="center_vertical">

        <TextView
            android:id="@+id/tv_selected"
            android:layout_width="0dp"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:layout_weight="1"
            android:textColor="@color/ink_light"
            android:textSize="13sp" />

        <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton
            android:id="@+id/btn_select_all"
            style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.TextButton"
            android:layout_width="wrap_content"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:text="全选"
            android:textColor="@color/dai_cyan" />

        <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton
            android:id="@+id/btn_share_wechat"
            style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.TextButton"
            android:layout_width="wrap_content"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:text="分享"
            android:textColor="@color/dai_cyan"
            android:visibility="gone" />

        <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton
            android:id="@+id/btn_delete"
            style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.TextButton"
            android:layout_width="wrap_content"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:text="删除"
            android:textColor="#C62828" />
    </LinearLayout>

    <!-- 空状态提示 -->
    <TextView
        android:id="@+id/tv_empty"
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="0dp"
        android:layout_weight="1"
        android:gravity="center"
        android:text="暂无文档"
        android:textColor="@color/ink_light"
        android:textSize="15sp"
        android:visibility="gone" />

    <!-- 文档列表 -->
    <androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView
        android:id="@+id/rv_docs"
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="0dp"
        android:layout_weight="1"
        android:clipToPadding="false"
        android:padding="8dp" />
</LinearLayout>
